巫妖量劫初，前往域外修炼。
……
封神量劫末，万仙阵一战，截教大败，通天终于想起了自己的大弟子。
当顾长生回归洪荒之时，发现截教近乎全灭，怒不可遏，誓要让四圣三教血债血偿！
姜子牙：“这封神没法封了。”
老子：“截教大弟子竟有如此修为！”
西方二圣：“别打了，别打了，我西方教退出还不行么？”
鸿钧：“顾长生，你要如何？”
顾长生：“不如何，把封神榜换一换而已。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8aba03d51c8e3b18c504e9e890642b7c","author":"我是真鲸了","author_id":"","book_id":"7084093354538961923","book_name":"洪荒：万仙阵被破，截教召我归来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7084116749603308073","read_count":"29080","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"380092"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"187","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/26f9db92d0b663834a6eadc1085ad7f8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306588&x-signature=nnxcb%2BSje8S5QoBpwEiOutdylrw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"786873168429876","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.192428e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220349489A7104E9A6CFA377812E"}"},"relate_info_list":[]
